$comment: GENERATED by tooling/gen_capability_manifest.py — do not hand-edit; run `make manifest`. Gated by tests/test_capability_manifest.py.

semantics.core: the authoritative model (docs/models/framegraph.py) admits the capability
semantics.sdk: a same-named public builder method exists on a framegraph.sdk.author class (raw-dict authoring always works and does not count), or the capability is itself a framegraph.sdk export
semantics.mcp: reachable through the live MCP registry: model capabilities via an author→render tool, SDK exports via run_sdk_code, tools directly

renderers.summary: Rasterize FrameGraph documents through headless Chromium.
render_fixtures.py — a dependency-free SVG proxy renderer for FrameGraph v2 docs.
render_golden.py — golden-render harness for the b1/ authoritative oracle.
render_latex.py — the LaTeX/TikZ render engine CLI (a peer to render_fixtures.py).
render_pdf.py — combine a FrameGraph document's SVG pages into one PDF.
